title.rendered: Getting Started with Prowler and Compliance

content.rendered: Join Prowler CEO Toni de la Fuente and Engineer Pedro Martin for an in-depth exploration of Prowler’s compliance features. In this 60-minute session, you’ll learn how to leverage Prowler’s compliance checks to meet industry standards, streamline audits, and improve your security posture. Don’t miss this chance to gain practical insights, see live demos, and discover best practices for maintaining compliance in the cloud.
